mapper.select:
SELECT
oi.id, oi.order_id AS orderId, oi.dish_id AS dishId,
d.name AS dishName,
oi.count,
oi.price,
d.picture, oi.item_status AS itemStatus
FROM order_item oi
LEFT JOIN dish d
ON oi.dish_id=d.id
WHERE oi.order_id=#{orderId}

SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id AS orderId, o.table_id AS tableId, dt.table_name AS tableName, oi.dish_id AS dishId, d.name AS dishName, oi.count, oi.price, d.picture, oi.item_status AS itemStatus FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON o.id=oi.order_id JOIN dining_table dt ON dt.id=o.table_id LEFT JOIN dish d ON d.id=oi.dish_id WHERE o.pay_status=0 ORDER BY oi.item_status, o.create_time, oi.id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_item WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND item_status=0
